thought.text:
The 15 stores were hoisted out of the outer loop! Now `while.body3` only has `add62 = j+1`. The inner loop reads `s[m]` which is loop-invariant (set in preheader). Now LICM should also be able to convert the loads to constants!

Let me run scoring:

action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && cmake --build build -t task4-score 2>&1 | tail -25 | head -20
